event: Peaceful summer landscape near a lake with birch trees
description: A luminous summer landscape showing a cluster of tall birch trees with abundant green foliage dominating the center. A small wooden structure or fence is visible on the left among the trees. A lone figure sits or works in the shade beneath the trees. Rocky ground with lush grass fills the foreground, while a body of water with a distant sailboat extends to the right. The sky is pale blue with light clouds. Birds fly in the distance. The atmosphere is calm and sun-drenched.

_meta.title: In the Vicinity of St. Petersburg
